languages.text: "...похитил ее с корабля Вольного Торговца, который даже не подозревал, сколь ценный предмет попал к нему в руки во время очередной сделки. Мне еще предстоит разобраться в происхождении этого занятного устройства, названного Латунной Призмой — когда-нибудь, когда я найду для этого время".

traits.locale_text: "Медная Призма — так ее, по крайней мере, называют представители примитивного Человечества. Я похитил ее с корабля Вольного Торговца, который даже не подозревал, сколь ценный предмет попал к нему в руки во время очередной сделки. Мне еще предстоит разобраться в происхождении этого занятного устройства — когда-нибудь, когда я найду свободное для этого время".

languages.text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."
languages.original_text: "...похитил ее с корабля Вольного Торговца, который даже не подозревал, сколь ценный предмет попал к нему в руки во время очередной сделки. Мне еще предстоит разобраться в происхождении этого занятного устройства, названного Латунной Призмой — когда-нибудь, когда я найду для этого время".

traits.locale_text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

"The Copper Prism — at least that is what primitive humans call it. I took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device — someday, when I find the time."

"The Copper Prism — at least that is what primitive humans call it. I took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device — someday, when I find the time."

"...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

languages.text: “……我从一名行商浪人的船上取走了此物。那家伙在一次平淡无奇的交易中得到了这件物品，却丝毫不知它的珍贵。我目前还没弄清楚这件名为“铜棱镜”的有趣装置的出处。等哪天有空了，我会再研究研究。”
languages.original_text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

traits.locale_text: “……我从一名行商浪人的船上取走了此物。那家伙在一次平淡无奇的交易中得到了这件物品，却丝毫不知它的珍贵。我目前还没弄清楚这件名为“铜棱镜”的有趣装置的出处。等哪天有空了，我会再研究研究。”

languages.text: «... lo llevé de la nave de un Comerciante Independiente que no conocía el valor del objeto que había acabado en sus manos durante una transacción rutinaria. Tengo pendiente determinar el origen de este fascinante dispositivo conocido como el Prisma de Latón... Algún día encontraré el momento».
languages.original_text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

traits.locale_text: «... lo llevé de la nave de un Comerciante Independiente que no conocía el valor del objeto que había acabado en sus manos durante una transacción rutinaria. Tengo pendiente determinar el origen de este fascinante dispositivo conocido como el Prisma de Latón... Algún día encontraré el momento».

languages.text: « ... pris sur le vaisseau d'un libre-marchand, qui ignorait tout de la véritable valeur de cet objet acquis au cours d'une transaction de routine. Je suis toujours déterminé à découvrir la provenance de cet intrigant appareil surnommé le Prisme de cuivre... Un jour, quand je trouverai le temps. »
languages.original_text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

traits.locale_text: « ... pris sur le vaisseau d'un libre-marchand, qui ignorait tout de la véritable valeur de cet objet acquis au cours d'une transaction de routine. Je suis toujours déterminé à découvrir la provenance de cet intrigant appareil surnommé le Prisme de cuivre... Un jour, quand je trouverai le temps. »

languages.text: "Sıradan bir işlemin parçası olarak eline geçen bu nesnenin değerinden habersiz bir Hür Tacir'in gemisinden aldım. Bakır Prizma olarak bilinen bu ilgi çekici cihazın kökenini hâlâ belirlemem gerekiyor. Bir gün zaman bulduğumda."
languages.original_text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

traits.locale_text: "Sıradan bir işlemin parçası olarak eline geçen bu nesnenin değerinden habersiz bir Hür Tacir'in gemisinden aldım. Bakır Prizma olarak bilinen bu ilgi çekici cihazın kökenini hâlâ belirlemem gerekiyor. Bir gün zaman bulduğumda."

languages.text: "... vom Schiff eines Freihändlers, der nicht ahnte, welchen Wert das Objekt hatte, das ihm bei einer Routinetransaktion in die Hände gefallen war. Ich muss nur noch die Herkunft dieses faszinierenden Gerätes bestimmen, das als Messingprisma bekannt ist ... sobald ich Zeit dafür finde."
languages.original_text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

traits.locale_text: "... vom Schiff eines Freihändlers, der nicht ahnte, welchen Wert das Objekt hatte, das ihm bei einer Routinetransaktion in die Hände gefallen war. Ich muss nur noch die Herkunft dieses faszinierenden Gerätes bestimmen, das als Messingprisma bekannt ist ... sobald ich Zeit dafür finde."

languages.text: 「…この奇妙な装置の起源を調べるのは、まだ時間がない。この「ブラス・プリズム」と呼ばれる装置は、ルーグ・トレーダーの船から手に入れたもの。ルーグ・トレーダーは、この装置の価値を知らなかった。ルーグ・トレーダーは、日常的な取引の一環として、この装置を手に入れたのだ。」
languages.original_text: "...took it from the ship of a Rogue Trader, who had no idea of the value of the object that had fallen into his hands as part of a routine transaction. I am still to determine the provenance of this intriguing device known as the Brass Prism — when I find the time."

traits.locale_text: 「…この奇妙な装置の起源を調べるのは、まだ時間がない。この「ブラス・プリズム」と呼ばれる装置は、ルーグ・トレーダーの船から手に入れたもの。ルーグ・トレーダーは、この装置の価値を知らなかった。ルーグ・トレーダーは、日常的な取引の一環として、この装置を手に入れたのだ。」
